summary: Frontend testing completed for mobile responsiveness and relocated visa tools. All 7 test cases PASSED: 1) Hamburger menu visible and functional on mobile, 2) Homepage sections display correctly on mobile, 3) CountryDetailModal usable on mobile, 4) Check Eligibility button appears in VISA INTELLIGENCE section after search, 5) Document Checklist button appears in VISA INTELLIGENCE section after search, 6) Visa tools auto-fill with searched country (Japan), 7) Branding shows 'Travito.co.in'.

console_warnings.message: Encountered two children with the same key
console_warnings.note: Non-critical React warning about duplicate keys in list rendering

passed_tests: Mobile responsiveness - Hamburger menu visible on mobile viewport (375x667)
Mobile responsiveness - Hamburger menu opens/closes correctly showing Home, Visa, Travel Tips, Contact links
Mobile responsiveness - VISA INTELLIGENCE section displays correctly on mobile
Mobile responsiveness - TOP DESTINATIONS section displays correctly on mobile
Mobile responsiveness - CountryDetailModal opens and is usable on mobile viewport
Mobile responsiveness - CountryDetailModal is scrollable on mobile
Mobile responsiveness - Close button visible and functional in modal on mobile
Relocated visa tools - Check Eligibility button hidden before search (correct behavior)
Relocated visa tools - Document Checklist button hidden before search (correct behavior)
Relocated visa tools - Check Eligibility button appears in VISA INTELLIGENCE section after searching for Japan
Relocated visa tools - Document Checklist button appears in VISA INTELLIGENCE section after searching for Japan
Visa tools auto-fill - Check Eligibility modal has 'Japan' pre-selected after searching for Japan
Visa tools auto-fill - Document Checklist modal has 'Japan' pre-selected after searching for Japan
VISA INTELLIGENCE section shows country-specific info after search (Visa Type: Visa Required, Processing Time: 5-15 business days, Cost: ₹4,000 - ₹16,000)
critical_code_review_comments: React key warning in console - duplicate keys in list rendering (non-critical, cosmetic issue)
preSelectedCountry prop correctly passed from Seasons.js to VisaEligibilityChecker and DocumentChecklistGenerator components
searchResult state properly tracks the searched country and conditionally renders visa tool buttons
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified working: 1) Mobile responsiveness with hamburger menu, 2) VISA INTELLIGENCE section with Check Eligibility and Document Checklist buttons that appear after searching for a country, 3) Visa tools auto-fill with the searched country name, 4) Branding shows Travito.co.in. The CountryDetailModal also opens automatically when selecting a country from search dropdown.
